package.name: ros2_iio_medical
package.description: ROS2 bridge between Linux IIO medical biosignal devices and ROS2 topics. Supports ADS1299 (EEG/ECG), MAX86150 (ECG/PPG), ti-ads1298 (ECG), and any Linux IIO device with standard sysfs or triggered buffer interface. Intended for medical robotics and surgical monitoring applications.
